reports.title: meetily
reports.summary: 一款注重隐私的 AI 会议助手，基于 Rust 构建，提供更快的实时转录、说话人分离和本地总结。
reports.content: Description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai -  https://meetily.ai ) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.; Stars today: 1409

reports.content: Description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.; Stars today: 1532

reports.title: system_prompts_leaks
reports.summary: 整理了 Anthropic、OpenAI、Google、xAI 等多个模型/工具的系统提示词。
reports.content: Description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.; Stars today: 981
